title: LLM-agent steering eval
description:
Build an LLM-agent steering eval that measures whether validation actually helps a real agent converge on valid plans, using the deterministic scenario set.

## Background

No current measurement shows whether rule changes improve agent outcomes. The eval must run in isolated temp repositories; sub-agents must never touch a production .jit.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] An eval drives a real agent through the steering scenarios in isolated temp repositories, recording iterations-to-green and rule-compliance per scenario
- [ ] Results are reported as the mean over at least 3 runs per scenario, with per-scenario stability noted (always, sometimes, never complies)
- [ ] The eval can be re-run after rule or message changes with a documented procedure and comparable output
- [ ] Eval repositories are fully isolated from any production .jit state
